Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's take a look at the Formation Manager at top left and find our Ko-45 attack flight. Note that aircraft flights receive a callsign, and the aircraft type is shown below in the Formation Manager.
On the right side of the Ko-45 attack flight entry, we have a dropdown for their attack orders types:
all aircraft will follow the Formation Leader's waypoint, altitude, and speed orders
all aircraft will fire weapons independently, but follow the Formation Leader's waypoints
